name: DMMHub — Community Directory
description: A curated list of DMM-compatible Dolibarr modules.

modules.name: DoliModuleManager
modules.description: Module manager with GitHub integration for Dolibarr

modules.name: SQL Magic
modules.description: Parameterized SQL queries in self-service for Dolibarr

modules.name: Adminer for Dolibarr
modules.description: Adminer database management tool integrated into Dolibarr

modules.name: File Manager for Dolibarr
modules.description: Integrated web file manager for Dolibarr

modules.name: Object Banner
modules.description: Floating navigation banner linking documents on Dolibarr cards

modules.name: Dolicraft Dashboard
modules.description: Advanced dashboard for Dolibarr with 19 widgets, drag-and-drop, KPI, and charts

modules.name: Dolicraft S3
modules.description: Connect Dolibarr to any S3-compatible cloud storage (AWS, OVH, Scaleway, Wasabi, MinIO, ...)

modules.name: Dolicraft Upgrade
modules.description: One-click Dolibarr core upgrade with auto-backup, 10 pre-checks, and rollback
